Slot: FINGER
EXPENDABLE Charges: 2
AC: 4
Effect: Levitate (Any Slot, Casting Time: Instant)
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Summoned: Ring of Flight
Temporary
Slot: FINGER
EXPENDABLE Charges: 2
AC: 4
Effect: Levitate (Any Slot, Casting Time: Instant)
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY

This item is summoned.
  • Summon Ring of Flight

No more bat wings
QuoteReply
# Dec 27 2011 at 1:16 AM Rating: Good

Scholar
41 posts
Summoned one tonight for the first time on a new (alt) mage. Got the ring with no bat wings on me, so reagent is no longer necessary.

Not a Fake
QuoteReply
# Aug 27 2002 at 2:45 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591764730371
8 posts
Bieng a Magician I know my spells. Not yet owning a Spell: Summon Ring of Flight I am not sure if this information is correct.

This is a Ring of Levitation.
"Summon Ring of Flight" - I think that if a Magician summons that then it will be called a "Ring of Flight" not "Ring of Levitation"
▲ Page top
Ring
QuoteReply
# May 22 2002 at 9:02 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591771979712
29 posts
Ok YES there is a ring that magicians can summon and giv eu to people u put it in your Finger slot and right click it if u have someone else targetted u just wasted a charge if not u got levitate it is No Rent i had 6 from gfay some magician was summoning them for fun and i took afew its nice to have if u wanna jump off spires or something ok so it is NOT a fake so get over it
▲ Page top
sigh
QuoteReply
# Nov 29 2001 at 10:21 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591764434108
24 posts
as some guy that already posted earlier. this is a summoned ring from mages. yes we bored mages drop these on the ground and give it to npcs for the fun of it. however, it is a REAL item. if anyone needs one of these, go find a mage and ask him to summon you some.
▲ Page top
I got this ring
QuoteReply
# Sep 05 2001 at 12:25 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1603066957194
2 posts
Fought a burly gnoll in Black Burrow.
Go this ring off him.
It was no rent, so i used it.
Makes you float like dead man spell.
Only had 2 Charges.
Right click on the ring when you have equiped it.
Use it ONCE when you need too.
The second use works but the ring and the +4 ac disappear at the end of the spell.

I found this ring on the ground. I had no idea how to make it work. The next time I logged on it was gone. I'm sure glad I didn't sell the ring I had on that finger. EQ should change the description of this item.

# Jun 02 2001 at 5:36 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591760024644
18 posts
how to use it is: put in slot and right click, you only get to use it 3 times and it goes away, it makes you levitate, of course, and it goes away in THIRTY MINUTS so use it wisely!

QuoteReply
# May 13 2001 at 10:50 AM Rating: Excellent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Didn't any of you guys play before the NO RENT messages were implemented? This is an Old picture, and could probably use an update
▲ Page top
Ring of Levitation
QuoteReply
# Apr 16 2001 at 5:28 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592757247604
6 posts
This ring is summoned by a lvl 39 Mage conjuration spell, Summon Ring of flight - It IS no rent.

It costs 100 mana and the ring can be sold for 20pp. The spell can be brought in Ak'Anon, Erudin and Neriak.

It can also be researched, you need:

Words Of Collection
Star Rose Quartz

The ring casts Leviate - on either you or another player (targeted). It takes 6 secs to cast and has a recharge time of 6 secs. Unfortunatly, there are only 2 charges per ring.

Although, as a caster, you can summon as many of these as you wish.......

I hope that answers all your questions.

▲ Page top
RE: Ring of Levitation
QuoteReply
# Jun 04 2002 at 1:56 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592254794408
21 posts
Haha! A no rent item selling for 20pp! Nice joke!
Heehee ^_^
▲ Page top
RE: Ring of Levitation
QuoteReply
# Aug 20 2002 at 3:37 PM Rating: Decent
pewterskier
82 posts
Actually a bargain in some circumstances.

Lev potion is over 150pp for a 10-dose. If you are a melee and know you will need this before logging (DL run, BW run, etc), it's more cost-effective than using your potion.
____________________________
Cirulik
Dread Lord of Greenmist

#REDACTED, Posted: Mar 01 2001 at 6:51 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Mages summon this, mabey some guy didint get the pic right, it dosent matter! All summoned items are no rent we know, So why whine about it?
This is Summoned
QuoteReply
# Jan 27 2001 at 2:05 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593965770809
40 posts
Mages do drop things like this sometimes just because it's easyer (and gives newbies a thrill when they find them). An update is due here, but I promise that nothing drops these unless a Mage is playing jokes by giving then to mobs.
